issues.description: Missing reveal mechanic. Card text requires revealing 1 card from top of deck before searching, then placing revealed card back.
SearchDeck filter incomplete. Must filter by type 'Whitebeard Pirates' AND cost ≤4. Current filter only specifies cost.
Filter missing type constraint. Should include 'HasType' or similar to check for 'Whitebeard Pirates'.
Missing action to handle card placement. Effect requires placing non-played revealed card at top or bottom of deck after searching.
